key_event.1789-1798: Parliamentary constitutionalism amid reaction to French Revolution
key_event.1799-1808: Wartime fiscal-military expansion and repression of radicalism
key_event.1809-1818: Wartime fiscal-military expansion meets repressed radical unrest
key_event.1819-1828: Peterloo and reform mobilization; repeal of Combination/Test Acts
key_event.1829-1838: Great Reform Act (1832) and rise of mass mobilization
key_event.1839-1848: Chartism and Corn Law repeal amid state administrative buildout
key_event.1849-1858: Post-Chartist civic deepening; free trade; cheaper press
key_event.1859-1868: Second Reform Act (1867) doubles electorate; TUC founded
key_event.1869-1878: Ballot Act, union legalization, and mass party mobilization
key_event.1879-1888: Third Reform Act (1884) expands electorate; balanced Red Queen growth
key_event.1889-1898: New Unionism and Dock Strike; expanded state administration
key_event.1899-1908: Liberal welfare reforms and Labour's parliamentary breakthrough
key_event.1909-1918: WWI mobilization, People's Budget, 1918 mass suffrage
key_event.1919-1928: Mass democracy completed alongside failed General Strike
key_event.1929-1938: Depression, union decline, and expanding interventionist National Government
key_event.1939-1948: WWII mobilization, Beveridge, 1945 Labour landslide, NHS founding
key_event.1949-1958: Welfare state consolidation; Suez exposes imperial limits
key_event.1959-1968: Affluence, declining deference, and sterling devaluation strain state credibility
key_event.1969-1978: Union militancy and stagflation weaken the Leviathan
key_event.1979-1988: Thatcher's defeat of unions and centralization of state authority
key_event.1989-1998: Poll tax revolt, devolution, Human Rights Act rebalance toward society
key_event.1999-2008: Devolution and rights culture vs. surveillance/security state expansion
key_event.2009-2018: Brexit referendum and austerity amid civic mobilization surges
key_event.2019-2028: COVID emergency powers, protest/judicial-review restrictions vs. functioning checks
